title: TaxDistribution
description: A distributional tax / income observation for a single Adjusted Gross Income (AGI) band — how income, tax liability, and credits are spread across NYC income groups. Canonical schema reconciling IBO's AGI-keyed Open Data tables: Personal Income by AGI Range (ipc3-2nbm), Income by Type and AGI Range (gffu-ps8j), Tax Liability by AGI Range (3vvi-fwjs), and Tax Credits/EITC by AGI Range (nwet-nc6h). Also carries the by-tax-type revenue lines from Tax Revenue since FY1980 (hdnu-nbrh).

numberOfFilers.description: Filers / taxpayers / recipients in the band ('Number of Filers' / 'Number of tax Payers' / 'Number of EITC Recipients').

percentOfTotal.description: Share of the citywide total this band represents ('Percentage' / '%').

taxType.description: For the Tax Revenue series (hdnu-nbrh), the tax line reported.
